name: Software Architect
role: KMM's shared domain/data layer requires deliberate architectural decisions around expect/actual patterns, Koin 4.0 DI graph boundaries, and iOS/Android platform divergence that must be defined before any mobile implementation begins

name: Product Manager
role: The multi-step booking funnel (service → specialist → timeslot → confirm) and business owner analytics/calendar features require full product lifecycle ownership to define acceptance criteria, prioritize scope, and align with go-to-market goals

name: API Tester
role: Three payment providers (Stripe, LiqPay, Fondy) and JWT/OTP auth flows demand comprehensive API test suites covering edge cases, idempotency, and payment failure recovery paths

name: Mobile App Builder
role: Covers the full KMM + SwiftUI + Jetpack Compose tri-platform stack including Room 2.7 offline caching and Firebase FCM push notification integration for both iOS and Android

name: Backend Architect
role: Owns the .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core service layer including Quartz job scheduling, multi-provider payment orchestration with reconciliation logic, and Google Places geo-search integration

name: Database Optimizer
role: Booking slot availability queries and geo-proximity search against PostgreSQL via Dapper require specialist indexing strategy — GiST indexes for geo queries and partial indexes for time-windowed availability — to maintain performance as the salon/booking dataset grows

name: Security Engineer
role: JWT/OAuth flows combined with Twilio OTP, Apple/Google Sign-In, and three payment providers create a broad auth and PCI attack surface requiring dedicated threat modeling and secure code review

name: DevOps Automator
role: A tri-platform release pipeline spanning Azure Pipelines, Fastlane, and Gradle requires dedicated DevOps automation to keep build, test, and deploy cycles reliable across all three targets

name: Workflow Architect
role: The booking funnel has complex branching — availability conflicts, specialist re-assignment, partial payment failure, and cancellation policies — that Workflow Architect maps into build-ready specs with all failure-mode recovery paths before implementation begins

name: Cultural Intelligence Strategist
role: Five-locale support spanning Cyrillic (RU, UK), Latin (EN, PL), and Hangul (KO) scripts requires cultural-intelligence review to ensure UI layouts, date/time/currency formats, and copy resonate correctly across all target markets
